content:
Do not forget to include word counts in all your posts!

—————————

Week 1 Blog

Blog posts are intended to be multi-modal and incorporate different pieces of media. Imagine while doing this assignment that you are a blogger; when you put yourself in those shoes, imagine what a webpage looks like as a reader experiences it—it has images, links to videos, podcasts, or perhaps even music. Your goal with this assignment is to present visually appealing information that achieves the assignment’s goal while also making clear connections to the outside multimedia material you incorporate into your blog post.

—————————

Week 1 Assignment: Narrative Outline & Worksheet

The purpose of the pre-writing activity is to explore multiple avenues. I liken pre-writing to walking around a car dealership and test driving a few different cars before settling on one specific vehicle. When you are engaged in the pre-writing phase, take your idea to its extremes. Explore the topic and all of its facets as best you can, and perhaps something you may have never considered will arise and take hold. If you do not fully explore the potential of the pre-writing stage, then you are walking into that same car dealership and driving the first car out of the lot that you see, and you might not know whether you and this car are the best matches for one another.
